title: pelargonium × hibiscifolium
intro: Pelargonium × hibiscifolium, also known as the Cape Marigold or Red Tip Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. This plant is prized for its bright red and yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × hibiscifolium have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
